name: Team Yang
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We're in awe of the Yang Gang today. We put an ambitious goal in front of you and together you accepted and surpassed our expectations.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1269%2E377263%2EMlc4UO) Hey Yang Gang --

We are just in awe of what the Yang Gang accomplished this quarter. We hit not just one goal -- but two goals!

8 days ago we set a very ambitious goal of raising $1.5 million by the end of the quarter. In 7 days, the Yang Gang blew it out of the water. So early yesterday morning we raised the stakes and announced a new $2 million goal. **The Yang Gang said loud and clear, “CHALLENGE ACCEPTED.”** [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10721?t=2&akid=1269%2E377263%2EMlc4UO) We can’t stress enough how big this is. Hitting these public goals not only allows us to make even more critical investments in our early state programs but it shows the media and the pundits that the Yang Gang isn’t going anywhere.

To show our gratitude, we are giving every member of this team a special prize --**an exclusive discount code.**

Use the code CHALLENGEACCEPTED at checkout on [**Shop.Yang2020.com**](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10721?t=3&akid=1269%2E377263%2EMlc4UO) to receive a 30% discount on anything in the store. The code will be live until midnight tomorrow, so get shopping!

Thank you so much for all your support. Let’s win this!
Team Yang | **Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/12681?t=7&akid=1269%2E377263%2EMlc4UO)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=4&akid=1269%2E377263%2EMlc4UO) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=1269%2E377263%2EMlc4UO) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

name: Michael Bennet
subject: answering the call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friends, I wanted to take a moment to share my gratitude for this team. I've asked a lot of you over the last few months. Your individual contributions helped us to not just meet but exceed our fundraising goals. So thank you for everything you continue to do. We wouldn't be here without you.

It's not lost on me that some people considered this campaign a long shot, but the power of our grassroots team continues to dispel their doubts, and I'm grateful to have you in my corner.

As a nation, we face momentous decisions about our future.

If we are again at one of history's turning points, as I believe we are, then we have a choice to make.

We must decide if we'll take the easy path of our worst instincts and pessimism in our country, or if we will confidently rally together with vigor and optimism.

The United States is the world's oldest and greatest democracy. It has grown in prosperity and power even as it has matured in its understanding of the rights its founders first articulated, as subsequent generations of founders sharpened those rights and extended them to people long denied them.

**_There is still so much more to be done for our nation._**

Each of us, with individual talent and spirit and hard work, is called upon to be a founder. Each of us - in obligation to others - is called upon to rebuild the republic. What if each of us were to answer that call?

With immense gratitude,

Michael Bennet

---

name: Mike Franken
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Thanks to the support of this remarkable grassroots team, we reached our quarterly fundraising goal last night!
|
---

| | Team, I believe in being candid with you and getting to the point. So here it is: **Thanks to the support of this remarkable grassroots team, we reached our quarterly fundraising goal.** This is a consequential moment for our campaign. I could not be happier. More importantly, I could not be more humbled to have the emotional support of so many people; it is incredibly rewarding to know that so many citizens have invested their resources in this campaign, as well. The month of October will include visits throughout the state, talks on the radio, some press availabilities, visits with industry and small manufacturers, and a renewed effort to develop a long-term funding strategy. For now, once again, permit me to thank you for stepping up and being a part of the team. \-- Mike
---

subject: Trump's Transparency is Driving the Left Nuts (and Messing Up Their Impeachment Dreams)
body:
"He wasn't supposed to release the transcripts. Or the whistleblower report. He was expected to do what any president would have done." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6f4c255491&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump's Transparency is Driving the Left Nuts (and Messing Up Their Impeachment Dreams)**

“He wasn't supposed to release the transcripts. Or the whistleblower report. He was expected to do what any president would have done – what President Obama always did. Hide the evidence,” former Rep. Jason Chaffetz (R-UT) writes in Fox News.

“As House Democrats rolled out their latest meticulously choreographed, perfectly timed, and broadly coordinated attack on President Trump, they weren't counting on the president's unprecedented transparency. Nobody releases a transcript of calls between heads of state. But Donald Trump did.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4b5a28626e&e=3ee4985eea)

**See for yourself:**[Read the full transcript of President Trump’s call.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85f7fbbdf5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Ivanka Trump and the CEO of Google, Sundar Pichai, will host a roundtable in Dallas on Thursday which will focus on preparing American workers for the changing economy,” Jason Whitely reports for [**WFAA**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=98df8fcc83&e=3ee4985eea). “The Dallas visit is part of the Administration’s commitment to preparing American workers for the 21st-century economy and the emerging industries of the future,” a goal that’s being steadily accomplished by the Pledge to America’s Workers.
---
|
---
| “The Obama administration bungled its response to the nation’s opioid epidemic, according to a stunning inspector general’s report released Tuesday that says the Drug Enforcement Administration allowed painkiller production to soar even as deaths mounted,” Stephen Dinan reports for [_**The Washington Times**_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8adc82fc37&e=3ee4985eea). “DEA officials failed across the board, said the Justice Department’s inspector general, pointing to a ‘toxic’ environment, lack of data to spot the mounting crisis, and a failure to use tools that could have shut down some of the worst offenders.”
---
|
---
| “Our founders created the greatest country in the history of the world, where anything is possible. We have the freedom to get an education, raise a family, travel, pick a career, and live in peace. Few countries are like America,” Sen. Rick Scott (R-FL) writes in [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9fa3e06ae2&e=3ee4985eea). “It really is amazing. And it’s important to stop and think about it sometimes – what we have and what we could lose if we let Democratic socialists have their way.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=96d244d398&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d9af3d3ed9&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=3835fe23bb)
---

subject: New poll shows Lindsey Graham losing ground in SC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|

| | Peter, Lindsey Graham, former Trump critic and current Trump sycophant, is peddling in extreme conspiracy theories and proven-false White House talking points in an effort to prop up the administration \-- and it may cost him his re-election. He's called the entire whistleblower complaint "hearsay," labeling it a setup on "Face the Nation." He said that Trump's call with the Ukrainian president was "very appropriate" and that it was completely ethical for Trump to pressure a foreign country to dig up dirt for him. Lindsey Graham routinely defends Trump's racist tweets and attacks against members of Congress, and he stood by Trump even after the president's supporters chanted, "Send her back!" toward Rep. Ilhan Omar. He's even defending Trump's trade war with China as his own constituents face layoffs and a slow economy as a result. His actions are having a tremendous impact on his re-election chances. Since June, Democratic challenger Jaime Harrison has cut the gap in half and is now only seven points down with 13 months left to close the rest of the gap. body:
September was critical for our campaign. And because of you, we proved that we are strong, unified, and ready for anything that the GOP will throw at us. For that, I can't thank you enough.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191002eoqty-ful&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, thank you.

Our September deadline -- our first FEC deadline since Jason Lewis announced -- was critical to our campaign.

And because of you and your incredible support, we were able to prove that we are not standing down in this race.

This is only the beginning. Jason Lewis, Donald Trump, and the GOP have seen what we've accomplished and will be more determined than ever to pour money into the state and hire more staff to try to turn Minnesota red.

There will be more challenges to face and hurdles that will test us. But I know after this last month, we are ready for anything in the months ahead.

When we are unified, nothing will stand in our way.

Again, thank you,

Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. name: Sara Gideon
subject: temperature check
body:
Checking in!
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c72/4bef7a87/6b709d3f/287f24a3/2119501893/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
It's been a busy few days, what with our FEC deadline on Monday night.
So now that our deadline has passed and we have a second to breathe, I want to take this opportunity to check in with our supporters. Can you spare a minute?
**[Take my short survey and share how you think our campaign is going so far. I want to know how you're feeling and if there's anything you want to see from my team in the coming weeks.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c72/4bef7a87/6b709d3f/287f24a2/2119501893/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjItZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/1910-campaign-survey?source=em190922-full")**
I mean it when I say you are a critical part of our team. Your support, and your grassroots donations, keep us moving forward -- so I want to make sure you are happy with the direction our campaign is going in. That's why surveys like this one are so important.
So really, thank you for your feedback. I'll read the results as soon as I can!
All my best,
_Sara_

name: Ellis Roussel
subject: Help Ralph Abraham Get Out the Vote!
body:
Thank you for offering to Volunteer for conservative republican Ralph Abraham for Governor. Early Voting is currently taking place and Ralph needs your help, now!

Ralph Abraham is the only candidate in the race that can beat John Bel Edwards. If John Bel gets more than 50% of the vote, he will win the whole election on primary day and there won't even be a general election. We can't let that happen! To prevent that from happening, please help Doc get the word out by calling your fellow voters across the state.

We are using the GOP’s Advantage 3 Red Dialer. It’s simple and easy. All you need to do is read the script to help get voters out to the polls. Just download the Advantage 3 Red Dialer app from your phone’s app store. If your device is not supported, please visit https://www.reddialer.gop <https://www.reddialer.gop/>.

To receive a username and password after you have reviewed the attached beginners guide, or if you want to help in some other way, please contact us at (318)639-4899 or ellis@abrahamforgovernor.com <mailto:ellis@abrahamforgovernor.com>.

Thank you again for your support!

Ellis Roussel
Ralph Abraham for Governor

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Our marijuana laws are outdated and hurting us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, In 2016, the U.S. incarcerated a whopping 2.2 million of its citizens \-- more than any other country. In addition to that, we spent over $47 billion to combat drugs, with more than $3 billion of that going to combat marijuana, even though 11 states and the District of Columbia have legalized its recreational use. The result is a lopsided "War on Drugs" that has decimated cities across the country and widened the divides of inequality to new levels: 46.9% of those charged with marijuana possession are Black or Latinx, despite making up only 31.5% of the population and marijuana use being consistent across races. This needs to stop. And it needs to stop at the federal level \-- we can't wait state by state for everyone to get on board. [**Legalizing marijuana would go a long way in reducing these unjust and harmful practices in our legal system, as well as ensuring universal application of the law. Please join us in urging Congress to legalize marijuana today and take a stand for fairness and equality.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdddb/6e9863e8/152e48c4/1db0ee6b/241378558/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://www.paction.us/marijuanalegalization/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you, The WDTO Team [SIGN THE PETITION](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdddb/6e9863e8/152e48c4/1db0ee6b/241378558/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://www.paction.us/marijuanalegalization/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal=2C=20National=20Political=20&=20Organizing=20Director?=
subject: DNC Updates - October 2
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/97cfdd558f1d/september272019-1534929?e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| |
---
| | Hi Family— I am reaching out with some updates knowing that despite the short Congressional recess, it’s another mission-critical week in the Democratic ecosystem, which is why I have to start on a note of gratitude. I am constantly heartened to see so many of you on the frontlines defending our democracy. And in tough times like these, just know that the DNC is disseminating key information around the clock to [highlight](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a37ad5b436&e=d6c5c7d7ec) how crucial it is that we win back the White House in 2020. We are building the infrastructure to help Democrats win. In that fight, I wanted to make sure you have our latest updates and ask for your help in directing diverse, talented Democrats to the below opportunities. Ahead you’ll find information on the next wave of Organizing Corps 2020 recruitment, which started yesterday; how you can share additional fantastic training opportunities like our Voter Protection Bootcamp and digital organizing webinars; and current open job positions in the states. As you’ve heard from Chair Perez, we are organizing early and everywhere, which you can see in these pieces from [the Huffington Post ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1cf07c51e2&e=d6c5c7d7ec)and [the Billings Gazette](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=b49817a0a2&e=d6c5c7d7ec). _**Organizing Corps 2020**_ This summer, Organizing Corps 2020 -- with your support -- trained 300 Corps members in ten cities to ensure we have the field force needed to take back the White House. We are excited to return to seven key battleground states for a one-week-on-campus bootcamp for current seniors/May 2020 grads. Get ready for the launch of**Organizing Corps 2020 Wave 2!** First up: Wisconsin and Arizona! The [application](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a9bfafa4ec&e=d6c5c7d7ec) for these winter bootcamps is now officially **_OPEN!!_**

We remain committed to recruiting local and diverse talent. Please help us share the application information with your networks by using the resources in our [**Outreach Toolkit** ,](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=28cc9beeaa&e=d6c5c7d7ec) including:
* Bootcamp flyer (AZ, WI)
* Social media graphic
* Social media post language
* Email language for blasts to networks and students

Additionally, we are recruiting[ Lead Coaches](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9fe1536ba5&e=d6c5c7d7ec) for our Wave 2 and Wave 3 programs. Please share this post with seasoned organizing, training, and field management professionals who would be a great fit! For any questions regarding our next wave of recruitment and training programs, please reach out to the points of contact listed below:
* Wisconsin- Emma Arata, Organizing Corps 2020 State Program Director, [emma@organizingcorps2020.com](mailto:emma@organizingcorps2020.com)
* Arizona- Fred Curtis, Organizing Corps 2020 State Program Director, [fred@organizingcorps2020.com](mailto:fred@organizingcorps2020.com)

Thank you as always for your support and partnership as we continue to build the field force for our eventual Democratic presidential nominee. _**Additional Training Opportunities**_ **Voter Protection Law School Bootcamp:** The Democratic Party is launching the Voter Protection Law School Bootcamp in states across the country. The program will train the next generation of voter protection staff and volunteers. Deploying talent from our best law schools, the Voter Protection Law School Bootcamp Program will train and engage people where they are needed most -- on the ground, in battleground states. The program will run from October 2019 through early December 2019 and will target second- and third-year law students. It will consist of two classroom hours per week, with lectures covering the history, current state, and future of voting rights and voter protection work. Most importantly, the bootcamp will train students on the practical methods of running a voter protection program during a campaign cycle. Participants will be responsible for conducting at least one voter engagement and volunteer engagement program. To have voter protection staffers ready to support the 2020 campaign, we need to start training now. To Apply: Complete the [online application form](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=42da20847b&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and email the following to vopro@dnc.org:
* Resume
* Short Writing Sample
* Personal Statement

Applications should be submitted exclusively through this web page and will be reviewed on a rolling basis. We encourage interested students to apply early. **Applications will close on October 4, 2019.** APPLICANTS MUST:
* Have a deep commitment to core Democratic tenets and principles.
* Be currently enrolled in the second or third year of a U.S. law school.
* Be a U.S. citizen or permanent resident.

**Digital Organizing Webinars:** Calling all college students and folks seeking a job in the digital space in 2020 or beyond? The DNC is going to be hosting periodic webinars on digital organizing for people who want to work on campaigns. [Apply here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=bd41a1b807&e=d6c5c7d7ec) today! **Best Practices Institute:** The [Best Practices Institute (BPI)](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f94ec129b3&e=d6c5c7d7ec) is the shared training department of the DNC and the ASDC. The BPI delivers trainings to activists and volunteers, party leaders and staff, students and youth organizers, candidates and campaign staff, constituency caucus members and community leaders, and so many more! Since its inaugural year in 2018, the BPI expanded the existing training department from four training programs to a robust department with 14 independent training programs, and counting! In 2019 alone, the BPI has already trained over 10,000 party leaders and activists across the country and the world. Check out [their website](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=040af8463c&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to find additional training opportunities!
_**Job Opportunities **_ Know great folks? As we work to build the infrastructure for our eventual Democractic presidential nominee, many of the Democratic state parties are hiring for key positions. Do you know anyone in your network who would be a good fit for these roles: [AZ Latinx Outreach Engagement Manager](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f70423d10d&e=d6c5c7d7ec), [AZ Native American Outreach Manager](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4f9163e07c&e=d6c5c7d7ec), and [ME Communications Director](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8827fde740&e=d6c5c7d7ec)? Additionally, [we’re hiring](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=38b0dddfec&e=d6c5c7d7ec) here at the DNC! In Solidarity, Muthoni Muthoni Wambu Kraal

subject: I want to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States

**Do you think Mike Pompeo should be held accountable for egregiously misleading the American people and impeding the House’s constitutional investigation into President Trump?** | [YES ➞](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U234zFf4O6O0bGgqkxtVqg1kCAvLz7TSub6jA7xG_1JWG1MTiHzdD7F6t-XiqbAt-ZA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191002_fr&n=1) | | | | | [NO ➞](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U234zFf4O6O0bGgqkxtVqg1kCAvLz7TSub6jA7xG_1JWG1MTiHzdD7F6t-XiqbAt-ZA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191002_fr&n=2)
---|---|---|---|---|---
President Trump’s Secretary of State Mike Pompeo admitted that he was on the phone while the president was putting the shakedown on the President of Ukraine. This was just TEN DAYS after he misled the American people on national TV about his role in these events.
**Now he’s looking for ways to prevent State Department employees from complying with the House’s impeachment inquiry.**
Given the historic nature of these events, and the fact that President Trump continues to be a threat to our democracy and national security, I want to know:
**Do you think Mike Pompeo should be held accountable for egregiously misleading the American people and impeding the House’s constitutional investigation into President Trump?**
[YES ➞](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U234zFf4O6O0bGgqkxtVqg1kCAvLz7TSub6jA7xG_1JWG1MTiHzdD7F6t-XiqbAt-ZA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191002_fr&n=3) | | | | | [NO ➞](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U234zFf4O6O0bGgqkxtVqg1kCAvLz7TSub6jA7xG_1JWG1MTiHzdD7F6t-XiqbAt-ZA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191002_fr&n=4)
---|---|---|---|---|---
Thanks for sharing your opinion with me on this critical issue.
— Bill
| [DONATE ➞](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGPMb_kOo-B_c-7UTzZWpaTo&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191002_fr&n=5)

name: Cory Booker
subject: I'm personally asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, I know it's hard to believe, but it's already time to start preparing for the next DNC debate -- and I need your help before I take the stage in just 13 days. **I 'll get straight to the point, team. I want your input on what issues matter the most to you. [Can you take two minutes to fill out our official October debate prep survey? This is the most effective way to share your thoughts with me.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/debate-four-survey?source=em_su_20191002_CB_20191002-su-CB-debatesurvey-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/debate-four-survey?source=em_su_20191002_CB_20191002-su-CB-debatesurvey-actives_actives_button1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I've been on the trail for over eight months -- talking to folks about what matters to them, hearing stories and ideas, and bringing their priorities to the forefront of this campaign. I've heard from people about the need to discuss the existential threat of climate change and how we're going to address it as a country. And I've heard about how we must combat white supremacy, implement sensible gun control measures, and stand up for reproductive rights. **[But this is only the start, team. What issues do you most want to hear about in the next debate?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/debate-four-survey?source=em_su_20191002_CB_20191002-su-CB-debatesurvey-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** One of the founding principles of this grassroots campaign is that everyone deserves to have their voice heard. And that includes you. When I step onto that stage in a few weeks, I want to be ready -- and with your help, I will be. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/debate-four-survey?source=em_su_20191002_CB_20191002-su-CB-debatesurvey-actives_actives_button2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a76/5fca0d19/77cae834/291f7e9f/2677847177/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a76/5fca0d19/77cae834/291f7e93/2677847177/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Andrew Yang
subject: We're only just getting started
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
It’s clear -- this movement cannot be ignored! We have what it takes to go all the way... and we’re only just getting started.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1288%2E377263%2EYHXWEO) Hey Yang Gang --

**Thank you so much for helping us fundraise our way to a record third quarter -- $10 million. No one thought we’d get this far, but I knew the Yang Gang would get us here.**

The media is starting to take notice. The Yang Gang cannot be ignored anymore. We have what it takes to go all the way -- but we’ve got a lot of work ahead of us leading up to Iowa and New Hampshire. We’ll be expanding the team and opening up offices in more early primary states.

But this is just the beginning. We have to exponentially grow over the next month to ensure we get our Humanity First message to every American.
